name: AI Test Generation Pipeline

on:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'input_requirement.txt' # Runs only when the requirement changes

jobs:
  run-ai-agents:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          pip install crewai langchain_openai python-dotenv selenium

      - name: Run AI Agent Factory
        env:
          OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
          OPENAI_MODEL_NAME: "gpt-4-turbo"
        run: python main.py

      - name: Upload Generated Test Report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: Final-AI-Test-Report
          path: Final_AI_Test_Report.txt
